seoTitle: How to Use Klarna With PayPal Checkout (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to pay with Klarna inside a PayPal checkout by generating a one-time virtual card and entering it as a payment method.
intro: Klarna can't be linked to PayPal as a permanent funding source, but you can still combine buy-now-pay-later flexibility with a PayPal checkout using Klarna's one-time virtual card feature. This guide covers generating that temporary card and entering it during a PayPal payment. It's useful for shoppers who want installment plans on purchases routed through PayPal.

steps.heading: Open Klarna and find your store
steps.body: Launch the Klarna app, search for the merchant you're shopping with, and add items to your cart on their site.

steps.heading: Generate a one-time virtual card
steps.body: At checkout, tap Pay with Klarna to create a temporary virtual card, then choose your installment plan and confirm your purchase amount.

steps.heading: Note the virtual card details
steps.body: Klarna will display a 16-digit card number, expiration date, and CVV code generated specifically for this purchase.

steps.heading: Enter the card into PayPal
steps.body: Select PayPal as your payment method at checkout, choose to add a debit or credit card, and type in the virtual Klarna details.

steps.heading: Match billing info and pay
steps.body: Make sure the billing address matches your Klarna profile, then confirm payment to authorize the first installment through PayPal.

faq.question: Can I link Klarna directly to my PayPal wallet?
faq.answer: No, Klarna doesn't currently support being saved as a reusable funding method inside PayPal; the virtual card workaround is needed each time.

faq.question: Is the virtual card reusable for future purchases?
faq.answer: No, each virtual card is generated for a specific purchase and typically can't be reused elsewhere.

faq.question: Will this affect my Klarna credit limit?
faq.answer: Yes, using Klarna this way draws against your existing available credit limit just like a direct Klarna checkout would.

faq.question: What happens if I miss an installment payment?
faq.answer: Missed installments are managed directly through your Klarna account and may affect your future borrowing eligibility.
